name: Merkle QuickSlot (now Blink Labs)

rebrand.note: Merkle / QuickSlot / Solana Boost have rebranded to 'Blink Labs'. All *.merkle.io domains (svm/quicksol/mempool/api/mbs.merkle.io) are absent from the live docs and replaced by *.blinklabs.xyz. The new dashboard portal is portal.blinklabs.xyz and the new website is blinklabs.xyz. All merkle.io domains are considered legacy as of 2026-06; existing merkle.io fields in this file are retained and annotated as legacy.

api_key.obtain_blinklabs: Email contact@blinklabs.xyz to request keys; manage via dashboard at https://portal.blinklabs.xyz (replaces mbs.merkle.io as of 2026-06).
api_key.searcher_api_auth: Searcher API uses a Flashbots-style signed-payload header: X-Blink-Signature (the request payload is signed and the signature passed in this header).

legacy.obtain: https://mbs.merkle.io (API Keys tab in dashboard) — legacy as of 2026-06; superseded by portal.blinklabs.xyz and contact@blinklabs.xyz.
legacy.mempool_api_header: X-MBS-Key — legacy header for *.merkle.io endpoints as of 2026-06.

tip_wallets.note: QuickSlot has 20 unique tip accounts (pick one randomly). Solana Boost uses a separate dedicated tip account. The 'sponsor' wallet is used by the active gas-sponsorship feature (pm_isSponsorable): append a transfer of activeSponsorAmount (0.005 SOL / 5,000,000 lamports) to it, distinct from landing tips.

cost_on_failure: unknown (no docs on refunds; tip is via SOL transfer instruction so it executes if TX lands)

solana_rpc_blinklabs.description: Current Solana RPC endpoint (rebranded blinklabs.xyz domain) for sendTransaction and pm_isSponsorable. Per the live docs this replaces svm.merkle.io and quicksol.merkle.io, which no longer appear in the documentation as of 2026-06.

quickslot.description: QuickSlot global endpoint with automatic data center routing. No API key needed. (Legacy domain; no longer listed in live docs as of 2026-06 — see solana_rpc_blinklabs.)

svm_rpc.description: Solana RPC endpoint for sending transactions with API key auth. (Legacy domain; no longer listed in live docs as of 2026-06 — see solana_rpc_blinklabs.)

mempool_api.description: Private mempool API (primarily EVM, but endpoint exists)

rate_limits.note: Rate limits are now explicitly enforced. Excessive polling or flooding of endpoints is treated as endpoint abuse per the Searchers Terms & Conditions section 2.4.

sendTransaction_quickslot.description: Send transaction via QuickSlot (no API key). Must include a SOL transfer tip of >= 0.001 SOL to one of the tip wallets. On Solana the second param MUST be an options object with skipPreflight:true — the live docs warn the transaction fails preflight otherwise.

sendTransaction_svm_rpc.description: Send transaction via SVM RPC (requires API key in URL path). On Solana the second param MUST be an options object with skipPreflight:true — the live docs warn the transaction fails preflight otherwise.

getTransactionStatus.description: Check status of a Solana transaction

response_fields.boosted: boolean - whether transaction received Solana Boost priority

statuses.expired: Transaction did not get mined and its blockhash is too old

sendTransactions_mempool_api.description: Private mempool transaction submission (advanced, primarily EVM)

transactions: array of signed raw transaction strings

pm_isSponsorable.description: Checks whether an unsigned transaction is gas-sponsorable before submission. Used by the active gas-sponsorship flow: if sponsorable, append a Blink transfer instruction (sponsorWallet) before signing/submitting.

response_fields.sponsorable: boolean - whether the transaction is eligible for gas sponsorship
response_fields.sponsorWallet: string - wallet address to receive the appended sponsor transfer
response_fields.activeSponsorTransfer: transfer amount/instruction to append for active sponsorship

quickslot.performance_claim: Faster than Bloxroute, Temporal, and 0slot 70% of the time

solana_boost.description: Stake Weight Quality of Service (SWQoS) transaction broadcasting via Solana validator partnerships
solana_boost.verification: Check boosted field in transaction status response

private_mempool.description: Transactions held privately until block inclusion; auction with searchers for backrun MEV

user_cashback.description: Revenue sharing from MEV auctions back to users

universal_gas_payments.description: Universal Gas Payments: pay Solana transaction fees with any SPL token (e.g. USDC, USDT, etc.), auto-converted to SOL on-chain.

low_latency_solana.description: Low Latency Solana service: an add-on combining Jito relays and SWQoS clients for faster inclusion.

usage_models.automatic_inclusion: Transactions with an above-average priority fee are automatically routed through SWQoS.

swqos_routing.description: Stake-Weighted QoS (SWQoS) routing layer via partner validators controlling ~3% of active stake. Distinct from the solana_boost SWQoS broadcasting feature.

gas_sponsorship.description: Solana Gas Sponsorship with passive and active modes; uses Jito bundles with revert protection.

passive.description: Passive sponsorship lifts swap landing rates by up to ~5%.

active.description: Active sponsorship reduces sponsorship cost by ~90% via pm_isSponsorable plus an appended Blink transfer instruction.
